name: Soreheim Proper - Eternal Lands freight route
transition_feel: Travel out of Soreheim Proper along Eternal Lands freight route makes local power, escort custom, and risk tolerance immediately legible.
handoff_custom: Travelers feel a change in who watches, who records, and who expects payment, proof, or ritual acknowledgment.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Soreheim Proper - Eternal Lands freight route is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
